    R

    RED_POTION - Static variable in class utilz.Constants.ObjectConstants
     
    RED_POTION_VALUE - Static variable in class utilz.Constants.ObjectConstants
     
    render(Graphics) - Method in class main.Game
    Renders the current game state to the provided graphics context.
    render(Graphics, int) - Method in class components.AnimationComponent
    Renders the entity's animation and UI elements on the screen.
    render(Graphics, int) - Method in class components.RenderComponent
    Renders the entity's animation.
    render(Graphics, int) - Method in class entities.Player
    Renders the player on the screen.
    RenderComponent - Class in components
    Component responsible for rendering an entity's animations.
    RenderComponent() - Constructor for class components.RenderComponent
     
    reset() - Method in class objects.GameObject
    Resets the animation and object state.
    reset() - Method in interface objects.IGameObject
     
    resetAll() - Method in class entities.Entity
     
    resetAll() - Method in class entities.Player
    Resets the player's state to its initial values (health, position, etc.).
    resetAll() - Method in class gamestates.Playing
    Resets the game state, including player, enemies, and objects.
    resetAllEnemies() - Method in class entities.EnemyManager
    Resets all enemies.
    resetAllObjects() - Method in class objects.ObjectManager
    Resets all objects in the current level.
    resetAniTick() - Method in class components.AnimationComponent
    Resets the animation tick and index to start the animation from the beginning.
    resetBools() - Method in class ui.MenuButton
     
    resetBools() - Method in class ui.UrmButton
    Resets the mouse interaction states (hovered and pressed).
    resetDirBooleans() - Method in class components.MovementComponent
    Resets the left and right movement flags.
    resetDirBooleans() - Method in class entities.Entity
    Resets the direction booleans to false.
    resetDirBooleans() - Method in class entities.Player
    Resets the player's directional boolean values.
    resetEnemy() - Method in class entities.Enemy
    Rests all enemies.
    resetHealth() - Method in class components.AnimationComponent
    Resets the health to maximum.

    RIGHT - Static variable in class utilz.Constants.Directions
     
    run() - Method in class main.Game
    The main game loop, controlling the FPS and UPS, updating and rendering the game accordingly.
